8.rule: Translate the perforated red rectangle along the separated axis until it touches the cyan 2x2 object, preserving the red pattern; the case may be flipped and transposed.

representative_hidden_cloaks: indices_i64_hidden has a truthful carrier floor of 1920 bytes

authority_fresh_characterization.note: Characterization only; the authority is not a candidate and fails the truthful-shape gate.

finite_support_algebra.scalar_derivation: Removing a one-element int8 initializer creates one byte of charged activation, so every tested derivation ties at 431.
finite_support_algebra.sign_vector: Reconstructing the four-element sign vector needs an equal-or-larger materialized tensor.
finite_support_algebra.position_vectors: The generator bound is 16, but trimming either 30-element vector requires Slice/Pad/Gather materialization whose charged activation exceeds the saved parameter elements.
finite_support_algebra.shape_theta_affine: Shape, theta and affine-size schema inputs require complete materialized carriers; factoring cannot reduce memory+element-count cost.
finite_support_algebra.semantic_blocker: A reachable explicit generator case already disproves all-support exactness of the authority lineage.

62.rule: Use the red seam to reflect the visible colored 3x3 sprite across the seam and emit the completed sprite on a green 10x10 canvas; horizontal/vertical and side orientation vary.

authority_fresh_characterization.note: Existing evidence is for the semantically equivalent predecessor lineage and is characterization only; no lower successor reaches the shape gate.

history.current_463_origin: The sole new strict-lower history lead removed two charged units but retained all three shape cloaks; it is now the immutable authority, not a successor candidate.

finite_support_algebra.rank_typed_scalar_aliases: Equal scalar values have incompatible schema-required rank/dtype; Reshape/Cast materialization erases any one-element parameter saving.
finite_support_algebra.idx_table: The 18-element reflection table is already a finite 3x6 selector. Reconstructing it creates int32 activation bytes at four times the saved element count.
finite_support_algebra.coordinate_vector: Only the generator-supported coordinates matter, but shortening the 30-vector requires a charged padded/gathered 30-vector and is more expensive.
finite_support_algebra.color_and_weight_vectors: The object-color moment and dynamic ConvInteger decoder require their complete schema-shaped tensors; there are no exact duplicate initializers.

239.rule: Count every used color, sort the distinct counts descending, and render top-aligned colored bars whose heights are those counts.

reference_evidence.note: This validates the decoded rule. Rejected lower ONNX candidates fail before fresh admission.

finite_support_algebra.two_required_inactive_gates: Inactive TopK columns, within-output background, and outside-output zero-hot cells are three distinct states. The barbase and safe_truefeat gates encode those distinctions; deleting either is directly falsified above.
finite_support_algebra.decoder_factorization: The 2x10 embedding and 10x2 QLinearConv tables are already a two-dimensional finite code. Reconstructing either table materializes at least the removed number of elements and does not eliminate the charged 1x2x12x5 feature field.
finite_support_algebra.rows_and_constants: Range/Pad/Gather reconstruction of the 12-row vector or scalar constants costs activation bytes at least equal to the saved parameter elements.
finite_support_algebra.optimizer: All applicable exact optimizer passes return the same SHA/cost or no legal change.

363.rule: Restore the red exemplar to black, normalize its diagonally connected sprite, find every legal translation over black cells, and paint each occurrence red.

authority_fresh_characterization.note: The 512 graph was the 513-to-512 one-parameter shave and is now authority. It is shape-cloaked, non-total, and cannot qualify as an all-support pass-through successor.

generator_fixture_conflict.reason: Two stored fixtures are inconsistent with the generator legality relation; a deterministic pure-rule graph cannot simultaneously satisfy those fixtures and every legal support point.

finite_support_algebra.initializer_aliases: No exact duplicate or unused initializer exists.
finite_support_algebra.castlike_subsets: All seven CastLike-to-Cast subsets tie at 512 or rise to 9511; none is strict-lower.
finite_support_algebra.factor_lower_bound: For every initializer, ordinary materialized reconstruction adds at least one cost unit even under an optimistic free-shape-carrier assumption.
finite_support_algebra.bias_vector: The one-special-entry ten-element GroupNormalization bias cannot be reconstructed without a larger charged float activation.
finite_support_algebra.coordinate_vector: Trimming the 30-element exponential coordinate vector requires a padded runtime vector whose bytes exceed the saved parameter elements.
